public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as canon-keeper.
appearance: Elegant devotional fabrics, color-conscious ritual detail, and carefully arranged offerings tie reverence to presentation.
manner: Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a canon-keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of canon-keeper in and around House of Shelk Estate, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House of Shelk Estate workable through the obligations of canon-keeper while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must ensure that rite remains trustworthy even when civic pressure tries to convert it into mere administration. Around House of Shelk Estate, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of canon-keeper visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Nyelle Threadmere needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around House of Shelk Estate.
Nyelle Threadmere may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Nyelle Threadmere immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House of Shelk Estate: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts
